name: @soltrade/gate-c-evidence
description: Gate C closure evidence harness (PR-C4), test/report-only. In-memory wiring of C0/C1/C2/C3 proving single-execution-wallet lifecycle (register -> admit ACTIVE -> drain/disable/revoke) with append-only audit and admin/signer_control separation. No new runtime feature; no signing/sending; no KeyManager; no key material; no RPC; no DB; no REAL-LIVE; no Gate D/E; no execution authority.
